FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    git \
    build-essential \
    cmake \
    ninja-build \
    pkg-config \
    libssl-dev \
    libevent-dev \
    libboost-all-dev \
    autoconf \
    automake \
    libtool \
    curl \
